author: hangleang
content: <@412614104222531604> how can I get the logs at the time? it's got pruned off after restarted

author: barnabasbusa
content:
install https://github.com/ethpandaops/panda

and use claude with panda to fetch this. One easy prompt would be:

```
use panda cli to fetch logs surrounding Jun-04 18:04:24.485[chain]            warn: Error processing execution payload from gossip slot=1522,
  peer=16Uiu2HAm1qZdMX6uEkyPJ3s2QxV6duVpP3oqiyNJFckzi24VqCat, root=0x1fbf515ac93b39681262ad9d54821fe138f1dbed364bd88b4deb284430a3f4ae - Envelope verification
  error: Withdrawals mismatch between payload and expected payload=0x76198fc02c9db23306f82cde906ff2130f961c5b389ac183e4ddbd32f6e67f4c
  expected=0x20e4544cb16f72a71d5936d5ed823b55d896e144b1219a30cf0220b1ba80e99a

  from grandine on glamsterdam-devnet-5 node, use external.otel_logs?
```
